name: implementer-and-craft-gate
_note: Speed redesign (sprint-compose-speed S1, 2026-06-13). The implementer is the WORKER ARCHETYPE — staffed at sonnet and fanned out by the runtime into N parallel leaves (RFC #35 args.items) at dispatch, NOT one serial opus context (the old cost mistake). The FAGAN reviewer is the SINGLE opus craft-gate, firing ONCE on the merged diff at the seam. Operator decision 2026-06-13: review_routing.council=false — a single strong opus gate over fanned cheap work, not a 2-voice council (the FR-E cryptographic council stays available for compositions that mandate it). Opus is reserved for the gate; no work seat runs opus.
